outlook.summary: Market at critical gamma flip zone (686). Positive 0DTE GEX provides near-term stability, but negative GEX in weekly/monthly expiries signals potential volatility amplification. Heavy put walls at 675-680 provide strong structural support. 700 CALL is major resistance. Max Pain cluster around 683-687 acts as price magnet.
